title: Questions like this that need answering
display_title: Questions like this that need answering
wikitext:
[]: Questions like this that need answering...             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Apr 02, 2007 2:07 pm In One More Final, why DOES everybody turn (back??) into LCL, anyway? Is that what we Lilim are made of since we're from Lilith?? I kind of understand it's the "Soup of life", in order words, that's what things evolved from in the world of Eva, but that's all I know about it...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Apr 02, 2007 2:12 pm This seems to be the relevant part of the action: Fuyutsuki: An anti-AT Field... (Eva series form into the Sephiroticum (Tree of Life)) Maya: All the data are just like 15 years ago! Then... this really is... The prelude to Third Impact! ----------------------------------- SCENE: Outside NERV 1st soldier: S2 system level critical! Background: Abort operations! All units pull back at once! 2nd soldier: We... We can't maintain molecular attraction any longer!

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Apr 02, 2007 2:21 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Without the AT field, existence as coherent individuals is impossible -- everyone just melts.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Apr 02, 2007 2:23 pm Another question (in no way related to the LCL one, but something else that I've been puzzled about) is this: in episode 19, when Shinji is at the shelter before ;eaving and running into Kaji, he hears (parapharsed) this (just before?? nigoki's head goes a flyin' into the scene!) Emergency Evacuation? Are you stupid? We don't need to evacuate, we're pilots!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Apr 02, 2007 2:27 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: My question is, is that really Asuka talking in flashback form

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 02, 2007 2:35 pm BrikHaus81 wrote: Unless, of course, you are an Angel. Then you just explode.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Apr 02, 2007 3:53 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Humans are literally the 18th, but it's symbolic in the sense that we don't have Angelic powers, as the other Angels are "humans who gave up human form."
summary:

Is that what we Lilim are made of since we're from Lilith?? I kind of understand it's the "Soup of life", in order words, that's what things evolved from in the world of Eva, but that's all I know about it...
